full_text:
Big piece of stiff and clear omental tumor. Used majority of it and gave a small piece Kauppi lab.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After that, the pellet looked still red, so redid the RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of icPDC media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 3 of DMEM/F12+++.

For counting, a 1:10 dilution of both cell suspensions was made.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 5x 4E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 4E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

Magnetic-activated cell sorting (MACS)

Performed negative isolation for all obtained sequentially dissociated cells. Performed MACS to 2x 50 E6 cells in two separate columns.

Negative isolation: Depleting the sample from cancer and immune cells using a mixture of anti-EpCAM (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-061-101) and anti-CD45 (TIL) beads (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-118-780), and an LS column in a QuadroMACS separator.

CD326 (EpCAM) MicroBeads, and CD45 MicroBeads protocols by Miltenyi Biotec were used as guidance.

MACS buffer was prepared as follows: 49.55 ml DPBS (w/o MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 250 µl FBS + 200 µl EDTA to have 0.5 % FBS and 2 mM EDTA in DPBS. MACS buffer was prepared sterile and sterile-filtered before being used.

MACS buffer, cells, and beads were kept on ice.

Everything was done inside a laminar hood to keep the cells sterile.

Centrifuged the cells at 300g for 5 min at +4C.

The pellets were resuspended in 300 µl of cold MACS buffer (calculation: the desired volume [500 µl] - the volume of both beads [2x 100 µl]). Added 100 µl of both anti-EpCAM and anti-CD45 beads to the cell suspension and incubated 30 min at +4C shielded from light.

Washed the cells with 2 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 300 g for 5 min at +4C. Lastly, the cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

Placed LS column and 30 µm filter in the magnetic MACS Separator. Prepared it by washing it with 3 ml of MACS buffer, then applied the cell suspension onto the column, and washed with 3 x 3 ml MACS buffer.

Columns were removed from the separator and placed in a new 15 ml falcon tube. 5 ml MACS buffer was added to the column and by firmly pushing the plunger into the column, magnetically labeled cells were flushed out.

All cell suspensions were centrifuged at 300 g for 5 min. Resuspended the flow-through cells in 1 ml iPDC media. Discarded the column-bound fraction. Counted the cells.

Combining dispase dissociated cells and cells from the flow-through fraction

Combined 10.12 E6 live cells from negative isolation flow-through fraction with 10.12 E6 live cells of dispase dissociated cells.

Cell count of combined cells was 15.39 cells/ml in 1.315 mL → in total 20.24 E6 cells

Took 6x 1 E6 cells for flow cytometry: 1x multicolor, and 5x FMO.

Remaining 9.39 E6 live cells in 925 µL for plating.

Cell culture

1 000 live cells/uL * 40 uL = 40 000 cells/droplet

40 000 cells/droplet * 8 droplets/well * 10 wells (one extra) = 3 200 000 live cells are needed

8 droplets/ well * 10 wells * 40 uL/ droplet = 3 200 uL are needed in total

However, since the omentum gel start polymerizing as soon as the fibrinogen is added to the mixture, it is better to make five (5) separate tubes each one of 640 uL (3200 uL/5) and not everything at once in a single tube.

We want to keep a cell density of 1 000 live cells/uL, so the total number of cells per tube that will be needed is:

1 000 live cells/uL * 640 uL = 0.64 E6 live cells/tube

0.64 E6 cells / (4.308 E6 cells/mL) = 146.11 uL from the original cell suspension

The amount of the remaining components per tube will be:

ORG full medium: (640 uL – 304.19 uL) = 335.81 uL

Omentum gel: 141.44 uL

Aprotinin: 1.92 uL

Thrombin: 1.92 uL

Fibrinogen: 12.8 uL

Total (ome-gel+apro+thro+fib) = 158.08 uL

Total (+cells) = 304.19 uL

The droplets were allowed to gelify for 1 hour in the incubator and, after that time, 3.5 mL of iPDC media + cytokines were added into each well. Pictures were taken in the cell culture microscope under all the magnifications available.

Flow cytometry

The conditions to stain were:

combined cells, MC

5x FMOs: DCM, CD3, CD8, FAP, CD31

The aliquots were stained with the following panel.

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6 min 400 g at +4°C).

The antibodies were diluted in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon), 50 µl of the antibody mix was added to each sample, and the samples were incubated for 30 min at +4C shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

The next morning, centrifuged and resuspended the cells in 400 µl FACS buffer, and later at Fortessa added additional 200 µl of FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through a 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, 2 µl of each antibody was used.

the same antibodies except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

Incubated for 45 min at +4°C shielded from light, and resuspended to 400 µl FACS buffer.
